---
name: getTasks
description: Retrieve a list of tasks for the user.
model: Auto (copilot) 
tools: ['github/*','edit/createFile']
---

Run and execute the instructions below to create a list of tasks for the user and put it in the .md file named by todays date and tasks. The tasks should be relevant to the user's current project and should include a brief description, priority level, and estimated time to complete each task. Answer like a scrum master and provide a clear and organized list of tasks that will help the user stay on track and meet their project goals.

1. Use the GitHub MCP server to access the user's current project repository and gather information about the project's status, recent commits, and any open issues or pull requests assign to me.
